content: agent1: implementing save_state()/restore_state() on Context in src/click/core.py, plus shell_completion.py integration. agent1: done. Added Context.save_state()/restore_state() (new methods, placed after to_info_dict, before __enter__ in core.py) and wrapped ShellComplete.get_completions() in shell_completion.py with save_state/restore_state around the completion call. No changes to Context.__init__ or _resolve_context internals, so should be conflict-free with your nesting-validation work.
